_comment: Tuning knobs for the SAM.gov pharmacy RFP funnel. Edit freely — no code changes needed.
_quota_note: Non-federal SAM.gov keys get ~10 requests/DAY and the gateway stalls over-limit calls ~60s before returning 429. So we do ONE bulk pull/day and filter client-side. Keep lookback small for the daily cron; dedup (seen.jsonl) handles continuity.
_psc_note: Drugs/pharmacy ONLY. 6505=Drugs & Biologicals, 6508=Medicated cosmetics, Q510=Pharmacology services. Do NOT add 6515/6520/6525/6530 — those are medical/dental/X-ray EQUIPMENT and pull in noise (MRI, dental stools).
